description_long: This is a concrete jersey barrier, rectangular in shape with a slightly tapered top and flat sides. The surface is heavily covered in colorful graffiti, including large stylized letters and tags in various shades of green, yellow, red, blue, and black. The barrier shows signs of urban wear, with some minor surface chipping and roughness, but no major structural damage. The graffiti is prominent on both long faces, with different tags and styles visible on each side. The ends of the barrier are narrower and also display some painted markings. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a gritty, urban aesthetic typical of barriers found along roadsides or in city environments.
description: A concrete jersey barrier covered in colorful graffiti and urban markings, showing minor wear and a rough, utilitarian surface.
description_view_0: Narrow end view showing the tapered top and graffiti extending onto the side.
description_view_1: Long side view with large, colorful graffiti tags and visible surface texture.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow end view, similar to view 0, with graffiti and rough concrete visible.
description_view_3: Other long side view featuring different graffiti tags and a similar rough, worn surface.
